description: OCR-specialized vision-language model for document understanding
notes: Qwen3 LLM (0.6B) + SigLIP vision encoder. Full-page OCR, 11 languages. Use --jinja for chat template.
F16 recommended — half the size of F32, negligible quality difference

description: AfriqueGemma 4B - African language model (20 languages + EN/FR/PT/AR)
notes: McGill-NLP/AfriqueGemma-4B. 20 African languages: af, am, ar, ha, ig, mg, ny, om, rw, sn, so, st, sw, ti, tn, xh, yo, zu + en, fr, pt. GGUF by mradermacher.
